subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Upon thee be My salutation, My glory, My mercy and My loving-kindness. When thou didst desire the Land of Yá and beheld darkness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک سلامی و بهائی و رحمتی و عنایتی اذا اردت ارض الیاء و رایت سواد
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @visitation Tablets, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
